obsidian-canvas.$description: Obsidian Canvas — Page background, card surfaces, inverted text on pink fills

parchment.$description: Parchment — Primary body and heading text — warm near-white with sepia undertone, replaces the typical cool white of dark UIs

bone.$description: Bone — Secondary text, button borders, metadata — mid-tone warm gray

ash.$description: Ash — Muted body text, subtle link borders, inactive labels

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Hairline dividers, low-emphasis borders, heading underlines on dark

neon-petal.$description: Neon Petal — Primary action buttons, active nav states, selected markers, occasional heading accents — the single chromatic punctuation in the system

acid-lime.$description: Acid Lime — Green wash for highlight backgrounds, decorative bands, and soft emphasis behind content. Use as a supporting accent, not as a status color

sans-serif.$description: sans-serif — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

geist.$description: Primary UI and body typeface — medium and semibold weights, tight negative tracking at -0.013em to -0.031em. Used for body copy, links, navigation, and small headings.

geist-pixel-triangle.$description: Display and section-label typeface — pixel/decorative variant used for all-caps section headers like 'SELECTED WORK' and the year range '2015 — 2026'. The pixel treatment gives editorial weight without serifs.

geist-mono.$description: Metadata typeface — timestamps, email, technical labels, year stamps. The monospace signals system/data language against the proportional body.

canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page background — true black for maximum contrast against warm text

project-surface.$description: Surface level 1: Project image and content frames sit directly on canvas without card elevation

accent-surface.$description: Surface level 2: Inverted pill buttons and selected markers — the only chromatic surface
